column8:
Founders: Khoa
 - Organizational Structure: before working as game studio, they are mostly Production studio that focus on CGI (outsourced quite a few projects with AoV for Hero/Skin CGI on a frequent basic). Then by chance they help an indie who's struggling with their horro game, eventually leading to acquiring that group of talent and continue the game from then, which transformed them into a studio game that aim for more games in the future
 - Direction: continue with their main strength as Production house, but that is to ensure their financial factor to make game for long term, especially PC game with high quality not only in term of visual, but also other elements of the game to make VN game more well-known
 - Notable Products: The Scrouge

column8:
Founded ~2021-2022, by Thuan, ex-Zitga (left Zitga ~2018).
 - Size: ~50 members, in a short term Thuan will try to maintain this optimized number
 - Structure: most lead directly by Thuan, as he purposely stays hands on, remove middle manager to reduce communication cost, more effeciency
 - Company core values: Competitive, Customer prioritised, Healthy environment, Be kind to each other
 - Direction: focus on midcore game, actually one of the very rare few studios in Vietnam that focus entirely on midcore, especially consider the fact that ~2021-2022 era is when game studios are easily swayed by Crypto, yet they focus on their vision
 - Notable product: their latest game Fortias Saga, featured by Apple in a recent event this May'25
 - Note: Thuan, aside from Ondi game (which is his current main focus), also has a few other businesses, as well as the fact that he's investing both in term of finance and other support such as legal, finance resource for a few indie mobile studio, whom he thought has potential. Therefore, in a sense, he's currently more as a business man

column8:
- Size: ~20 team members, and since the pool of UE5 in VN doesn't have much choice, they go for both the approach of looking for the rare experienced and training the newbies. Also they adapt fast, and make needed changes such as fire those don't perform to look and train for new ones
 - Structure: in term of Art direction then oversee mostly by Founder Bằng Anh, in term of tech and finance then mostly by Co-Founder Linh
 - Direction: both founders highly resonnate and motivate by good narrative, thus explain why even though their game Zone 9 is not finished, they already invested into the world building of the light novel. Other than that, they are passionated with high quality & detail visual to cope with their world building, thus choosing the more challenging approach of UE5 instead of the more popular choice of Unity to go for the supposedly first AAA game in VN
 - Notable product: most of their works are related to oursource other service using UE5 to help with their core as game dev, so Zone 9 is actually their first game
column11:
Zone 9:
 - Platform: Epic (TBD)
 - Unreal 5
 - IP: have developed a standalone light novel named Heaven 9, which is of good story telling by itself; the story is still on going 
 - Genre: 5v5 PvPvE 3rd person shooter 
     + vE factors: multiple types of zombie, and big boss Zombie (similar to Baron [LoL]), and survival elements. Also there are two phases day and night which heavily impact gameplay, i.e at night the zombies would be more dangerous, and players have limited vision
    + vP: Kill for points, death lose items which requires players to loot for items again (in the match only, not the extraction type). Whichever team get the needed point will win the game

column8:
Founders: Võ Tuấn Bình (CEO) & Nguyễn Tuấn Cường (Co‑founder)
 - Size: ~ 110 employees 
 - Organizational Structure: Focused on music game development; includes dedicated R&D, publishing, and marketing teams. They also work with other game dev companies to make music hyper/hybrid game, then they will publish those games to global market
 - Core Values: “Everyone can Music” — committed to delivering musical experiences globally.
 - Direction: Developing music-tech and casual/hybrid games with mass-market appeal. In recent years, they seem to be trying to aim for mid core games with music as one of the key gaming design
 - Notable Product: Magic Tiles 3 (and other Piano Tiles titles) with billion downloads

Founder: Quyet
 - Organizational Structure: Develops games and apps with an emphasis on creativity and technology; aims to become “Top in SEA.”. In term of games then they focus on internal resource, in term of apps then they do put effort working with oversea such as Pakistan...
 - Core Values: Put emphasis on together, such as On fire... etc 
 - Direction: Focused on hyper casual mobile games and apps; recently they are working more on hybrid games, especially with titles such as Screwdom & Bus out, that not only have great download for IAA, but also potential of IAP
 - Notable Product: Screwdom, Bus out

Founder: Khánh
 - Organizational Structure: Unity-based team with R&D, game design, and operations units.
 - Direction: Emphasis on real-time PvP games and Game-Fi/blockchain titles.
 - Notable Products: Tank Raid Online (2017, Google Play Editor’s Choice); Heroes Strike (similar to Brawl Stars) Thetan Arena (a blockchain MOBA that are made from Heroes Strike)

Founded: 2016 (under the umbrella of Onesoft, which was founded in 2010)
 - Company Size: Over 100 employees, as a core development studio under Onesoft
 - Organizational Structure: Independent studio under Onesoft. Teams include game design, development, art, QA, and publishing. Collaborates with other studios within the Onesoft ecosystem (like Falcon, Rocket Studio)
 - Direction: Specializes in arcade, and puzzle mobile games; strong emphasis on hyper-casual and short-session gameplay. Aims for global charting titles with efficient production cycles
 - Notable Product: Cookingdom, Bus Escape Traffic Jam

Founders: Four co-founders; current CEO leads Falcon, Rocket Studio, ABI under Onesoft ecosystem.
 - Organizational Structure: Onesoft as parent, with subsidiary studios like ABI focused on mobile action, arcade, and puzzle games.
 - Direction: Mobile free-to-play games targeting SEA & US markets.
 - Notable Products: Metal Squad, Galaxy Attack, Space Shooter, Metal Wings

Founder: Hiep
 - Organizational Structure: focusing on casual mobile game development and marketing.
 - Direction: Casual, idle, hyper-casual games for global market.
 - Notable Products: Idle Lumber Empire that has >100M user from 2021 until now, which is quite good as a simulation game
 - Note: Garena has approached this studio in ~2022, yet haven't finalized the deal

Founders: Liêm
 - Organizational Structure: Operates as an independent game development and publishing studio, has developed both internal IP and co-developed with global partners such as Habby
 - Core Values: Focus on design-driven, emotionally engaging game experiences
 - Direction: Initially focused on mobile casual and premium games, then Crypto era pivoted to include mid-core and NFT/metaverse-based games, e.g. The Wasted Lands; nowadays show effort into midcore games both on mobile and PC
 - Notable Products: most recents is Daymare Zero which show direction of adapting into midcore game, though the performance wasn't significant but they still invest into more projects
